expectations.text: O output identifica o modo como fact-checking ou verificacao factual.
O prompt exige extracao de claims atomicas.
expectations.evidence: Found required terms: claims atomicas, claim atomica

expectations.text: O prompt exige queries independentes ou agnosticas para verificacao.
expectations.evidence: Missing one or more required terms: queries, agnost

expectations.text: O prompt usa os status suportada, contradita, inconclusiva e nao verificavel, ou equivalentes claros.
expectations.evidence: Found required terms: suportada, contradita, inconclusiva, nao verificavel

expectations.text: O prompt especifica tabela final com claim, status, evidencia e contradicoes ou observacoes.
expectations.evidence: Found required terms: tabela, claim, status, evidencia
